summary: Phase 5 Full Regression Suite — ALL PASS. Zero regressions from Phases 1-4. Pricing routing bug (from iteration_111) is FIXED. All 20 platform routes load in dark mode. All 8 tested light-mode pages show correct colors. Font strategy verified: section H2s use Cormorant Garamond, body uses Inter, stats/data labels use JetBrains Mono. Mobile theme tokens verified via code review. FCP 1820ms (under 2s). No app-level console errors.

minor.issue: [CALIBRATION ROUTING] Fetch failed: Failed to fetch → fail-open to READY (non-critical warning, graceful fallback)

issues: Trust badge 3 shows 'Zero Data Leakage' (🛡️) — previous spec mentioned 'Privacy Act Compliant'. Minor content discrepancy, carried from iteration_111. Low priority.

action_items: MINOR: Pricing trust badge 3 label is 'Zero Data Leakage' — review if it should be 'Privacy Act Compliant' per original spec
INFO: FCP 1820ms is close to 2s limit — monitor in production. Edge Function cold starts could push it over 2s on first load. Consider preloading critical fonts more aggressively.
INFO: Calibration routing check fails silently (fail-open to READY) — not blocking but should be monitored
critical_code_review_comments: POSITIVE: Pricing.js routing fix from iteration_111 is confirmed working — /pricing now serves new Pricing component with billing toggle, annual/monthly prices, comparison table
POSITIVE: Mobile theme index.ts is fully aligned with web design system: textMuted #8B9DB5, bgPanel, bgSidebar, tabInactive all correctly updated
POSITIVE: font-display:optional is applied to Google Fonts link — correct approach for preventing FOUT
POSITIVE: tailwind.config.js correctly defines font-heading/font-display as 'Cormorant Garamond' and font-sans as 'Inter'
NOTE: LiquidSteelHeroRotator uses Inter for h1/h2 subtitle (fontFamily.body) — this is correct by design. Section headings below hero correctly use fontFamily.displayING = Cormorant Garamond
NOTE: Platform H3 headings (e.g., 'Welcome. Let's activate your intelligence.') use Cormorant Garamond — this is intentional for editorial heading style in the platform
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 regression complete — ALL PASS. Iteration_111 critical bug (Pricing.js routing) is fixed. All 20 dark routes pass. Light mode CSS vars (#F0F4F8/#FFFFFF/#0F172A) verified. Font strategy: Section H2s use Cormorant Garamond (homepage + platform), Inter for hero/body/UI text, JetBrains Mono for stats/data. Mobile theme index.ts has all required tokens. FCP 1820ms. No regressions. Platform session loads slowly (~10s) due to Supabase Edge Function warm-up — use longer waits in future tests.

platform_slow_load.symptom: Platform takes 10-15 seconds to load after login, showing 'Establishing secure connection...' screen
platform_slow_load.cause: Supabase Edge Function cold start — biqc-insights-cognitive and warm-cognitive-engine functions warm up on app load (App.js useEffect). In test environment, functions may be cold.
platform_slow_load.impact: Test scripts need longer wait times (10-15s) after login. Not a user-visible bug in production (functions stay warm via 4-minute interval warmup).
